creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
While attempting to start the sysutils/btop port installed from a binary package, on a Raspberry Pi 3 running 13.2-RELEASE, the application immediately aborts with the following error:

/usr/local/lib/gcc12/include/c++/bits/stl_deque.h:1484: std::deque<_Tp, _Alloc>::const_reference std::deque<_Tp, _Alloc>::back() const [with _Tp = long long int; _Alloc = std::allocator<long long int>; const_reference = const long long int&]: Assertion '!this->empty()' failed.
Abort trap (core dumped)

The port requires GCC due to libstdc++. On amd64 it runs as expected. After checking back with the port maintainer, this appears to be a GCC bug.
